summary: Directors & Officers Liability insurance protecting corporate directors and officers against personal liability for wrongful acts in their management capacity. Key financial lines product with Side A/B/C structure and entity coverage.

schemaEntities.description: Insured corporate entity. Custom: CompanyType, ListedFlag, ExchangeName, MarketCap, SubsidiaryCount, JurisdictionsOfOp, RevenueThreshold, LatestAccountsFiled, FCARegulated, EquityOfferings12m.

78 rules: listed company securities exclusion trigger (Side C), FCA regulated entity loading, cross-border subsidiary jurisdiction checks, financial distress exclusion triggers, prior known claims disclosure.
Director/officer entity. Custom: Title, AppointmentDate, PreviousInsurerDeclinedFlag, OutsideDirectorshipsCount, FeesAndBenefitsPA.

relationships.note: Side A limit driven by entity type, listing status, and market cap
FCA regulation and securities offering rules reference 10 entity custom fields
Multi-director scheduling -- standard GW Cloud additional insured pattern

migrationIssues.detail: Side C entity securities coverage eligibility and exclusion logic for listed companies. GW Cloud coverage eligibility rules can accommodate -- FCA listing data feed integration required.
FCA regulated entity flag requires FCA Financial Services Register lookup. No GW Cloud native FCA integration -- external API required.
Multi-jurisdiction subsidiary discovery and loading. Custom Gosu jurisdiction iteration -- GW Cloud underwriting rules can support with configuration work.
Prior known claims disclosure at renewal. GW Cloud renewal workflow supports prior claims capture -- minor configuration work.

cloudMapping.action: FCA Financial Services Register integration required at quote
Direct mapping -- GW Cloud native field
GW Cloud supports entity coverage -- Side C exclusion logic requires rule migration
